channel.title: Daily AI Digest
channel.description: Curated AI/ML signals — zero LLMs, pure algorithmic curation

item.title: Vista4D: Video Reshooting with 4D Point Clouds
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV — We present Vista4D, a robust and flexible video reshooting framework that grounds the input video and target cameras in a 4D point cloud. Specifically, given an input video, our method re-synthesizes the scene with the same dynamics from a different camera trajectory and viewpoint. Existing video...

item.title: UniGenDet: A Unified Generative-Discriminative Framework for Co-Evolutionary Image Generation and Generated Image Detection
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV — In recent years, significant progress has been made in both image generation and generated image detection. Despite their rapid, yet largely independent, development, these two fields have evolved distinct architectural paradigms: the former predominantly relies on generative networks, while the ...

item.title: Seeing Fast and Slow: Learning the Flow of Time in Videos
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV, cs.AI — How can we tell whether a video has been sped up or slowed down? How can we generate videos at different speeds? Although videos have been central to modern computer vision research, little attention has been paid to perceiving and controlling the passage of time. In this paper, we study time as ...

item.title: Context Unrolling in Omni Models
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV — We present Omni, a unified multimodal model natively trained on diverse modalities, including text, images, videos, 3D geometry, and hidden representations. We find that such training enables Context Unrolling, where the model explicitly reasons across multiple modal representations before produc...

item.title: TingIS: Real-time Risk Event Discovery from Noisy Customer Incidents at Enterprise Scale
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CL, cs.AI — Real-time detection and mitigation of technical anomalies are critical for large-scale cloud-native services, where even minutes of downtime can result in massive financial losses and diminished user trust. While customer incidents serve as a vital signal for discovering risks missed by monitorin...

item.title: SLAM as a Stochastic Control Problem with Partial Information: Optimal Solutions and Rigorous Approximations
item.description: 💬 Major HN discussion (154 comments) — Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is a foundational state estimation problem in robotics in which a robot accurately constructs a map of its environment while also localizing itself within this construction. We study the active SLAM problem through the lens of optimal stochastic contro...

item.title: There Will Be a Scientific Theory of Deep Learning
item.description: 💬 Major HN discussion (154 comments) — In this paper, we make the case that a scientific theory of deep learning is emerging. By this we mean a theory which characterizes important properties and statistics of the training process, hidden representations, final weights, and performance of neural networks. We pull together major strand...

item.description: 💬 Active HN discussion (66 comments) · ⭐ 22 stars today on GitHub — AI Agent Framework, the Pydantic way

item.title: luongnv89 / claude-howto
item.description: ⭐ 226 GitHub stars today · ⭐ 29.0k total stars — A visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — from basic concepts to advanced agents, with copy-paste templates that bring immediate value.

item.title: Why do all websites look the same now?

item.title: MemoriLabs / Memori
item.description: ⭐ 124 GitHub stars today · ⭐ 13.9k total stars — Memori is agent-native memory infrastructure. A LLM-agnostic layer that turns agent execution and conversation into structured, persistent state for production systems.

item.title: AI4Finance-Foundation / FinGPT
item.description: ⭐ 19.8k total stars — FinGPT: Open-Source Financial Large Language Models! Revolutionize 🔥 We release the trained model on HuggingFace.
